examples: The blade of the oar had entangled itself with the strap of her bag.
Each person has one oar which goes on one side.
They shoved off, presently, Tom in command, Huck at the after oar and Joe at the forward.
Suchen never understood what had driven her to grasp the oar at the last moment.
Young midfielder Tommy Oar was dropped along with Shane Lowry, James Holland and goalkeeper Eugene Galekovic.
